decisions.what: Added SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter card, font preload link, and DNS prefetch hint to index.html
decisions.why: Specification required comprehensive meta tags for SEO/social sharing plus performance hints; replaced existing description with the spec-mandated text

decisions.what: Created LazyImage component with priority prop toggling between fetchpriority='high' and loading='lazy' + decoding='async'
decisions.why: Specification described the props interface and conditional attribute behavior; onError handler sets a fallback background color via inline style

decisions.what: Marked the already-present prefers-reduced-motion media query with an ARVAD comment and rewrote src/index.css unchanged
decisions.why: The exact rule already existed at the end of the file; per workflow rule 9, the change is confirmed via inline comment and the file is still written

decisions.what: Replaced the raw avatar in Testimonials.tsx with and renamed the map variable from testimonial to t
decisions.why: Specification used t.avatar/t.author binding with width=48 height=48 and className 'rounded-full object-cover'
